content: I think i get matched with you pretty often too

I’m gonna go sleep, but something like Xu Pandia, give Pandia the Xu wellfare, pop Pandia exalt a few times, Exalt Xu for big dreamlure explosions

she should have something else going for her
I don't like her play style
Bit disappointed actually
woo a week not touching traphase
so many misplays

probably gonna take a bit for peeps to figure out a good comp for her
can Xu beat the turn 2 Kath oneshot
no but doll can
xu kit is meh imo
the arith consumption is too high
5 cost and deal literally low dmg
stealth is neat I reckon, but it doesn't do anything against my teams
its legit bad in this fast meta she needs to scale hard but is slow and the dmg is meh for that level of investment.
everyone and their mum is bringing barrier posse now to counter kath team
ironically this hits me more lol
now I had to bring 24 posse to counter that
it would be neat if it doesnt go away in 1 turn, basically taunt with extra steps
Nothing changed  nothing new same old stuff. Its like im still playing in the old patch ppl still using same teams to rank up fast
Hameln gmurphy can still be played but it's harder
Kath ramona is still cancerous
And they killed both of my alva team

Jenkin team comp might works now but you still get fked by the RNG of kath ramona
Or stag hamel
They one shot hameln

I meant hamel fucks jenkin over
I was thinking of changing hameln team comp
Its still works
No need to change
Since hameln team kind of got shafted
Hat should have been gutted imo
The wheels cost too much now
And kath should have had her x card be scaling by 5 instead of 10
So it one shot at turn 4 or 5
Instead of 3
High elo still play it ive faced them so much
I guess i got really unlucky
You just stall with ageis
All my hand were shit
Weaken and shield
What were ur posse
The girl from my turn
And the one that draw 3 for both
But i guess i should change it to reshuffle
You mean clem posse and leah?
Yeah
Yeah then just bad rng or just bad start  reshuffle
Like
You see when you start 2nd?
You mulligan everything
You use chest and use posse to draw
All strike hand

For 5 games in a row
Oh wow thats like such awful luck
Maybe i should go cassiah
Instead of gmurphy
But i don't have gdoll
Join the Kath meta
Stop spamming Alva and getting her nerfed every patch.
I don't. Have kath
That's the problem
And they killed alva with all of those nerf after nerf
Thoughts on Xu in traphase?
Oh lmao rip you.

Looks terrible in all pick. Too slow to do anything.
Might be decent in draft.
Even in draft it's rough
Cards too high cost
You can't do shit
Need to RNG it early for prepare but even then you only trigger the bonus dmg from exalt on 1 unit
I was thinking it'd be decent in draft too
she would actually be good in draft bringing a good single targeted damage to kill enemy dps fast
in all pick where team synergy matter 35 is scoffed at mostly since they just otk
but in draft that's reliable big damage
after facing her a bit I think she's best as a support dps
throw spellbound on their main dps and never clear it
XU in draft can work with the -2 cost wheel, but otherwise she’s a tad clunky but has crazy burst dmg
literally any other character would perform better than her
imagine using 5 arith to deal 12 dmg only
liz 5 cost deals x3 more damage
also her stack was so much mana for max 20% dmg reduction
im still gonna get one shot
shes too selfish for  a subdps and to lil dmg for dps
what does she do successfully
Not that much tbh
Remember draft is RNG relic too
You can get relics that increase arithmetica limit turn 1
Or the posse relic to RNG stalling posse
But other than that it's literally mulligan everything until you first draw her card
And it's even more fked if you play with the relic that reshuffle your deck at the end of the turn
The discard relic would be really poor too since you can't keep prep cards
Yeah
Literally everyone else perform better than her
In either debuff or dps or both
I imagine they will roll out buffs for her fairly quickly if not on the next trap patch
Seems very weak from what I've played against
I tried her in draft when i came across her in pick
It's just too hard to manage
And you're just giving a free dps slot to the enemy
Yeah in normals the closest I've seen to a viable comp is her and Pandia, but then you could pair anything else with Pandia and it'd perform better
If i wanted to pair a dps in yellow color
Then i'll better use stuff like pickman or jenkin
Instead of her
And pair it with pandia and amplify them after they exalt
With ramona it moght compensate for the cost
But you're better off with kath
Idkkk
Her gameplay feels not tested at all
Just like gmurphy and them reverting back her nerf
